title: Decorniqu 5 Pairs 10 PCS Mop Slippers for Floor Cleaning Supplies Reusable Microfiber Mop Socks Washable Mopping Slippers
features: Effortless Cleaning with Mop Shoes(10.6 x 3.6 inches): Make cleaning easier than ever with our mop shoes! This set includes 10 pieces (5 pairs), designed to be worn with bare feet or over shoes as mop slippers.The built-in elastic ensures a secure fit, preventing them from slipping off while you clean.Perfect for family use, these microfiber mop slippers for women let everyone join in the cleaning process, making floor care effortless and fun.

Comfort Meets Functionality – Reusable Mopping Shoes: Crafted from high-quality chenille fiber, these mop slippers shoes for floor cleaning are soft and effective.Designed with a built in elastic band, they fit most foot sizes, making them suitable for both men and women.Available in 5 vibrant colors (blue, green, purple, pink, and orange), these mop socks help keep track of individual pairs while ensuring efficient, mess-free cleaning.

Hands-Free Floor Care – Versatile Mop Socks & Shoe Covers: Whether you're cleaning the kitchen, bathroom, or office, these mopping slippers get the job done with ease.Attach them to a mop head for wiping windows, floors, or even your car.The ultra-absorbent microfiber ensures quick dust pickup and spill absorption, making these moppers for feet an essential tool for quick, effective cleaning in any room.

No More Bending – Easy-to-Wash Dusting Slippers: Tired of bending over while cleaning? Simply slip on these mop slippers for floor cleaning and enjoy effortless cleaning with your feet.These slippers are hand washable with soapy water and air-dryable for reuse, making them eco-friendly and convenient.

Stylish and Functional Mopping Shoes for Every Room: Combining practicality with style, these mop slippers shoes for floor cleaning are available in a variety of colors, offering both comfort and cleanliness.Whether you’re doing a deep clean or just tidying up, these stylish mop slippers for women provide a simple solution for keeping your floors spotless while looking great.Designed for durability and long-term use, they are the perfect addition to any home cleaning routine.
description: Product Description Size: 10.6 x 3.6 inches Material: Chenille microfiber Colors: Blue, Green, Purple, Pink, Orange Quantity: 10 PCS (5 pairs) Key Features: Versatile Use: Can be worn on bare feet or over shoes, doubling as Shoe Covers. Suitable for cleaning floors, windows, or even cars. Durable & Reusable: Made of high-quality microfiber, hand washable. Elastic Fit: Designed with a stretchy band, fits most foot sizes for men and women. Wide Application: Ideal for use in the home, office, or kitchen, on hardwood, tile, and laminate surfaces. Easy to Clean: Wash with soap and water, air-dry for repeated use.
